title: tribulus terrestris var. rajasthanensis
intro: Tribulus terrestris var. rajasthanensis, also known as Puncture Vine or Caltrop, is a specific variety of the Tribulus terrestris plant native to the arid regions of Rajasthan, India. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits associated with Tribulus terrestris var. rajasthanensis include improved cardiovascular health, enhanced athletic performance, and increased fertility in both men and women. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as capsules, tablets, and teas, which are available in various health food stores and online retailers.
